All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractCheck<SELF extends AbstractCheck<SELF,ACTUAL>,ACTUAL>
Base class for built-in check types.
AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF extends AbstractTemporalCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Base class for temporal check types.
ArrayCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for object arrays.
BigDecimalCheck
Fluent assertions for BigDecimal values.
BigIntegerCheck
Fluent assertions for BigInteger values.
BooleanCheck
Fluent assertions for Boolean values.
ByteArrayCheck
Fluent assertions for byte[] arrays.
Check<SELF extends Check<SELF,ACTUAL>,ACTUAL>
Core check interface.
CheckFactory<C extends Check<C,T>,T>
Factory for creating custom Check instances.
CollectionCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for Collection values.
ComparableCheck<T extends Comparable<T>>
Fluent assertions for Comparable values.
CsvCheck
Fluent assertions for CSV data.
Diff
Minimal line-by-line diff engine for assertion failure messages.
Diff.Line
 
Diff.Result
 
Diff.Type
 
DoubleArrayCheck
Fluent assertions for double[] arrays.
DurationCheck
Fluent assertions for Duration values.
EnumCheck<E extends Enum<E>>
Fluent assertions for Enum values.
ExecutionCheck
Fluent assertions for code execution — timing and exception behavior.
FailureHandler
Controls how assertion failures are reported.
FileCheck
Fluent assertions for files (Path and File).
FutureCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for CompletableFuture values.
InputStreamCheck
Fluent assertions for InputStream values.
InstantCheck
Fluent assertions for Instant values.
IntArrayCheck
Fluent assertions for int[] arrays.
IterableCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for Iterable values.
JsonCheck
Fluent assertions for JSON strings with structural comparison, path queries, and diff output.
JsonReality
Entry point for JSON assertions.
LocalDateCheck
Fluent assertions for LocalDate values.
LocalDateTimeCheck
Fluent assertions for LocalDateTime values.
LongArrayCheck
Fluent assertions for long[] arrays.
MapCheck<K,V>
Fluent assertions for Map values.
MatchResultCheck
Fluent assertions for regex MatchResult captures.
MultilineCheck
Fluent assertions for multiline strings.
NumberCheck<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>
Fluent assertions for numeric values (int, long, double, etc.).
ObjectCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for arbitrary objects.
OffsetDateTimeCheck
Fluent assertions for OffsetDateTime values.
OptionalCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for Optional values.
OrderedCheck<SELF extends OrderedCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Base class for checks on Comparable values.
Reality
Main entry point for Reality Check assertions.
RealityAssertions
Drop-in alias using the assertThat naming convention familiar to users of AssertJ, Truth, and Hamcrest.
SealedClassCheck
Fluent assertions for sealed classes/interfaces (Java 17+).
SnapshotCheck<T>
Fluent assertions that compare a value against a stored snapshot (golden file).
SnapshotManager
Manages snapshot files for golden-file testing.
SnapshotManager.MatchResult
 
SnapshotReality
Entry point for snapshot testing.
SoftChecks
Soft assertion entry point.
SoftChecksExtension
JUnit 5 extension that injects a SoftChecks parameter into test methods and automatically calls assertAll() after each test.
StatementBuilder
Builder for assertions with a custom failure message.
StreamCheck<T>
Fluent assertions for Stream values.
StringCheck
Fluent assertions for String values.
ThrowableCheck
Fluent assertions for exceptions.
ThrowingCallable
A callable that may throw any Throwable.
UriCheck
Fluent assertions for URI values.
UuidCheck
Fluent assertions for UUID values.
WithSoftChecks
Shorthand for @ExtendWith(SoftChecksExtension.class).
XmlCheck
Fluent assertions for XML strings.
XmlReality
Entry point for XML assertions.
YamlCheck
Fluent assertions for YAML strings with dot-path queries.
YamlReality
Entry point for YAML assertions.
ZonedDateTimeCheck
Fluent assertions for ZonedDateTime values.
